name: Pasta with Mushroom-Zucchini Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the zucchini and mushrooms to the pan. Stir-fry for 2 minutes until the vegetables begin to brown slightly.
3. Stir-fry the vegetables for an additional minute.
4. Add the white cheese to the pan and cook for half a minute more, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the cooked pasta to the pan and gently heat until evenly warmed through.
6. Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese on top before serving.
